name: Stuffed-Date Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and vanilla extract together.
2. Gradually beat in the sugar until well combined.
3. Add the egg and beat until light and fluffy.
4. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda) into a bowl.
5. Alternately add the sour cream to the sifted dry ingredients, mixing until just combined.
6. Stuff each date with a walnut half and roll in the dough to completely cover.
7. Place the stuffed dates on a well-greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for about 10 minutes, or until set.
9. Let cool before spreading with icing.
Icing:
Blend the ingredients together until smooth.
